title: Compass Courier
genericDescription: Support multiple input devices; abstract actions from hardware; improve accessibility through control options.
specificDescription: A delivery microgame with keyboard, mouse-click movement, touch support, and an in-game remapping panel for dash/interact actions.
gradingRubric: 30 pts input abstraction; 20 pts device support; 20 pts settings usability; 15 pts accessible design choices; 15 pts test report.
